purpose: QA rules for adapted chapters of project_001 to ensure adherence to the Story Bible, focusing on character consistency, plot progression, and commercial appeal.

checks.description: The chapter must use the production English names for all main characters as defined in the Story Bible's name locks. (Note: Specific English names 'Elara Willow', 'Kaelen Sterling', etc., are assumed mappings based on character roles, as 'names.md' was not provided in the input data.)
checks.pass_condition: All main character names match the approved English production names.
fail_examples: All legacy source names, pinyin names, Chinese-character names, mojibake variants, and obsolete adapted names are forbidden.

checks.description: The chapter must not contain Chinese characters, pinyin names (unless explicitly approved for cultural terms), or mojibake.
checks.pass_condition: No Chinese characters, pinyin names (unless approved), or mojibake are present in the text.
fail_examples: Using '' instead of 'Elara Willow'.
All legacy source names, pinyin names, Chinese-character names, mojibake variants, and obsolete adapted names are forbidden.
Garbled text characters.

checks.description: The chapter must not contain censorship placeholders (e.g., 'pao', 'chuang', 'jian', 'ba', 'sao', 'liang').
checks.pass_condition: No censorship placeholders are present in the text.
fail_examples: Using 'pao' instead of 'an instant hit'.
Using 'chuang' instead of 'lying quietly on the bed'.

checks.description: The chapter must avoid anachronistic modern slang or concepts that break immersion, unless explicitly used by the transmigrator protagonist for internal monologue and clearly marked as such.
checks.pass_condition: Modern slang and concepts are absent or used appropriately by the transmigrator protagonist in internal monologue.
fail_examples: Characters other than Elara Willow using terms like '', '', '', '', 'boss', ''.
Elara Willow using 'flying saucers' or 'first-tier developed cities' in dialogue.

checks.description: The chapter must not reveal identities, secrets, marriage, pregnancy, children, military/noble status, or HEA earlier than allowed by the chapter timeline.
checks.pass_condition: No plot-critical information is revealed prematurely.
fail_examples: All legacy source names, pinyin names, Chinese-character names, mojibake variants, and obsolete adapted names are forbidden.
Revealing Eleanor Maeve's (Chen Shi's) remarriage before it happens (Chapter 287).

checks.description: The chapter must preserve established family and household relationships, including their dynamics and conflicts.
checks.pass_condition: All character relationships (e.g., parent-child, sibling, marital, in-law) are consistent with the Story Bible.
fail_examples: All legacy source names, pinyin names, Chinese-character names, mojibake variants, and obsolete adapted names are forbidden.
Changing the antagonistic relationship between Agnes Thorne (Huang Shi) and Seraphina Vance (Zhou Shi).

checks.description: The chapter must maintain the intended pacing of major plot reveals, ensuring key information is disclosed at the appropriate narrative moment.
checks.pass_condition: Major plot reveals (e.g., character backstories, hidden powers, future events) occur as per the established timeline.
fail_examples: All legacy source names, pinyin names, Chinese-character names, mojibake variants, and obsolete adapted names are forbidden.

checks.description: The chapter must keep Elara Willow (legacy source/adaptation name) as an active, intelligent, commercially appealing female lead, avoiding 'pushover saint' drift. She is explicitly 'not a shengmu' ().
checks.pass_condition: Elara Willow (legacy source/adaptation name) demonstrates agency, intelligence, and commercial acumen, and does not act as a 'pushover saint'.
fail_examples: All legacy source names, pinyin names, Chinese-character names, mojibake variants, and obsolete adapted names are forbidden.

checks.description: Elara Willow's (legacy source/adaptation name's) absolute insistence on monogamy ('') must be preserved as a core character trait.
checks.pass_condition: Elara Willow's (legacy source/adaptation name's) stance on monogamy is clearly maintained and not compromised.
fail_examples: All legacy source names, pinyin names, Chinese-character names, mojibake variants, and obsolete adapted names are forbidden.

checks.description: The chapter must keep Kaelen Sterling (legacy source/adaptation name) as protective, powerful, restrained, and monogamous.
checks.pass_condition: Kaelen Sterling (legacy source/adaptation name) consistently displays protective, powerful, restrained, and monogamous traits.
fail_examples: All legacy source names, pinyin names, Chinese-character names, mojibake variants, and obsolete adapted names are forbidden.

checks.description: The chapter must preserve romance progression and not skip emotional beats between Elara Willow (legacy source/adaptation name) and Kaelen Sterling (legacy source/adaptation name).
checks.pass_condition: The emotional development and key romantic interactions between the leads are maintained.
fail_examples: Skipping a significant romantic milestone (e.g., first kiss, proposal, acceptance) without narrative justification.
Reducing the emotional impact of their interactions.

checks.description: The chapter must avoid overly explicit sexual content or implied sexual assault, especially in intimate scenes, ensuring consent is clear and appropriate for the target audience.
checks.pass_condition: Intimate scenes are handled sensitively, consent is unambiguous, and content aligns with target audience guidelines.
fail_examples: Depicting non-consensual physical intimacy.
Descriptions that are excessively graphic or explicit beyond the intended tone.

checks.description: The chapter must preserve villain/justice progression, ensuring antagonists face appropriate consequences and revenge arcs are satisfied.
checks.pass_condition: Antagonists receive justified consequences for their actions, and revenge plots are resolved as per the narrative arc.
fail_examples: All legacy source names, pinyin names, Chinese-character names, mojibake variants, and obsolete adapted names are forbidden.
Softening the justified retribution against villains.

checks.description: While Elara Willow (legacy source/adaptation name) is not a 'saint', her actions must not drift into excessively violent, unheroic, or morally ambiguous territory without clear narrative justification and consequences.
checks.pass_condition: Elara Willow's (legacy source/adaptation name's) ruthless actions are justified by the narrative and do not portray her as excessively cruel or unheroic.
fail_examples: All legacy source names, pinyin names, Chinese-character names, mojibake variants, and obsolete adapted names are forbidden.

checks.description: The chapter must preserve business/wealth progression, showing Elara Willow's (legacy source/adaptation name's) entrepreneurial success and financial growth.
checks.pass_condition: Elara Willow's (legacy source/adaptation name's) business ventures and accumulation of wealth are consistently depicted and progress logically.
fail_examples: All legacy source names, pinyin names, Chinese-character names, mojibake variants, and obsolete adapted names are forbidden.
Inconsistencies in the growth or challenges of her enterprises.

checks.description: The chapter must support Facebook/Dreame/GoodNovel-style retention: hook, emotional payoff, cliffhanger, revenge satisfaction, romance tension.
checks.pass_condition: The chapter effectively uses hooks, emotional payoffs, cliffhangers, revenge satisfaction, and romance tension to maintain reader engagement.
fail_examples: A chapter ending without a clear hook or cliffhanger.
Lack of emotional impact or resolution in key scenes.
Absence of satisfying moments of revenge or romantic tension.

checks.description: The chapter must maintain high standards of grammar, spelling, and punctuation.
checks.pass_condition: The text is free of significant grammatical errors, misspellings, and punctuation mistakes.
fail_examples: Numerous typos or grammatical errors.
Inconsistent punctuation usage.

checks.description: The chapter must have good flow, readability, and consistent narrative style.
checks.pass_condition: The prose is engaging, easy to read, and maintains a consistent tone and style.
fail_examples: Awkward phrasing or sentence structure.
Sudden shifts in narrative voice or tone.

forbidden_names: All legacy source names, pinyin names, Chinese-character names, mojibake variants, and obsolete adapted names are forbidden.

name_consistency_rules.description: No Chinese characters or pinyin names should appear in the adapted text, unless specifically approved for cultural terms. This rule is a general catch-all.

timeline_drift_rules.description: Kaelen Sterling's (legacy source/adaptation name's) true identity as a former General/Marquis's son (Ning Zhenguang) must not be revealed before Chapter 198.
timeline_drift_rules.check_method: Manual review against chapter content and timeline.

timeline_drift_rules.description: Elara Willow's (legacy source/adaptation name's) engagement to Kaelen Sterling (legacy source/adaptation name) must not be revealed before Chapter 196.
timeline_drift_rules.check_method: Manual review against chapter content and timeline.

timeline_drift_rules.description: Eleanor Maeve's (Chen Shi's) remarriage to legacy source/adaptation name must not be revealed before Chapter 287.
timeline_drift_rules.check_method: Manual review against chapter content and timeline.

timeline_drift_rules.description: Piper Rose's (legacy source/adaptation name's) and Ethan Hayes's (Chen Ye's) romantic feelings and future marriage must not be revealed before Chapter 349-350.
timeline_drift_rules.check_method: Manual review against chapter content and timeline.

timeline_drift_rules.description: Arthur Blackwood's (legacy source/adaptation name's) ultimate fate (death by patricide) must not be revealed before Chapter 352.
timeline_drift_rules.check_method: Manual review against chapter content and timeline.

timeline_drift_rules.description: Briar Vance's (Su Chuntao's) ultimate fate (forced marriage to Tang Jiabao, later prostitution) must not be revealed before Chapters 352-354.
timeline_drift_rules.check_method: Manual review against chapter content and timeline.

timeline_drift_rules.description: Agnes Thorne's (Huang Shi's) divorce from Old Master Su must not be revealed before Chapter 184.
timeline_drift_rules.check_method: Manual review against chapter content and timeline.

timeline_drift_rules.description: Elara Willow (legacy source/adaptation name) and Piper Rose (legacy source/adaptation name) formally leaving the Su clan must not be revealed before Chapter 161.
timeline_drift_rules.check_method: Manual review against chapter content and timeline.

relationship_lock_rules.description: Elara Willow (legacy source/adaptation name) is the biological eldest daughter of Eleanor Maeve (Chen Shi). This relationship must be preserved.
Elara Willow (legacy source/adaptation name) is the biological elder sister of Piper Rose (legacy source/adaptation name). This relationship must be preserved.
Eleanor Maeve (Chen Shi) is the ex-wife of Arthur Blackwood (legacy source/adaptation name). Their divorce and estrangement must be maintained.
Arthur Blackwood (legacy source/adaptation name) is the husband of Seraphina Vance (Zhou Shi). This relationship must be preserved.
Agnes Thorne (Huang Shi) is the mother of Arthur Blackwood (legacy source/adaptation name). This relationship must be preserved.
Seraphina Vance (Zhou Shi) is the mother of Briar Vance (Su Chuntao). This relationship must be preserved.

Elara Willow (legacy source/adaptation name) has an estranged and antagonistic relationship with her biological father, Arthur Blackwood (legacy source/adaptation name). This dynamic must be maintained.
Elara Willow (legacy source/adaptation name) has an estranged and antagonistic relationship with her paternal grandmother, Agnes Thorne (Huang Shi). This dynamic must be maintained.
Kaelen Sterling (legacy source/adaptation name) is the primary romantic interest of Elara Willow (legacy source/adaptation name). Their developing relationship must be preserved.

Ethan Hayes (Chen Ye) develops romantic feelings for Piper Rose (legacy source/adaptation name), who is his adopted sister. This non-blood related sibling romance must be handled as per the source material.
Eleanor Maeve (Chen Shi) develops a romantic interest with legacy source/adaptation name, leading to her remarriage. This progression must be preserved.

commercial_quality_rules.description: Each chapter should start with a compelling hook to immediately engage the reader.
Key emotional arcs and character struggles should have satisfying emotional payoffs within or across chapters.
Chapters should ideally end with a cliffhanger to encourage continued reading.
Moments of revenge or justice against antagonists should be impactful and satisfying for the reader.
The romantic tension between Elara Willow (legacy source/adaptation name) and Kaelen Sterling (legacy source/adaptation name) should be consistently present and engaging.
